title: Meter LLM call record
description: Canonical shape of one LLM call record written to the llm_calls table. Both the TS and Python packages MUST produce records matching this schema byte-compatibly: same field names, same units (usd, ms), same enums. Source of truth per docs/PLAN.md.

component.description: Lowercase slug identifying the component within the project (e.g. "extract_invoice").

model.description: Model ID as reported by the SDK response (e.g. "claude-sonnet-4-6").

tokens_in.description: Input tokens from response usage. Null when usage is unavailable (e.g. the call errored before a response).

tokens_out.description: Output tokens from response usage. Null when usage is unavailable.

cost_usd.description: Cost in USD, rounded to 5 decimals, computed from spec/prices.json. Null if the model is unknown in prices.json (record is still written, never estimated).

latency_ms.description: Wall-clock latency of the call in milliseconds.

status.description: Call outcome. "retried" is reported explicitly by the host app's llm client (scaffolder contract); the wrapper itself never retries.

error_type.description: Error classification when status is "error", e.g. "rate_limit", "timeout", "validation", "api_error". Null when the call succeeded.

request_id.description: Request ID from SDK response headers when available (e.g. "req_...").

trace_id.description: Optional external correlation id (e.g. Conveyor process trace).
